    G

    generateNewID() - Method in class data.IDGenerator
     
    generateNewKey() - Method in class data.KeyGenerator
     
    getAlbumsCount() - Method in class dataclasses.MusicBand
    Returns the number of albums.
    getBands() - Method in class dataclasses.Label
    Returns the number of bands.
    getCollectionType() - Method in class data.ClassesManager
    Returns a formatted string describing the type of the collection.
    getCommand(String) - Method in class data.DataCommands
    Retrieves a command by its name.
    getCoordinates() - Method in class dataclasses.MusicBand
    Returns the coordinates of the band.
    getCreationDate() - Method in class data.ClassesManager
    Returns the creation time of the underlying data file.
    getCreationDate() - Method in class dataclasses.MusicBand
    Returns the creation date of the band.
    getCreationTime() - Method in class filemanager.json.JsonDateReader
    Retrieves the creation time of the file and returns it as a formatted string with color.
    getCreationTimeOfFile() - Method in class filemanager.json.JsonParser
    Retrieves the creation time of the JSON file.
    getGenre() - Method in class dataclasses.MusicBand
    Returns the music genre of the band.
    getId() - Method in class dataclasses.MusicBand
    Returns the unique identifier of the band.
